zh.Rotherwas, Herefordshire (England): 英國英格蘭賀福爾洛瑟瓦斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Pembridge於大約1312年出生在英國賀福爾賀福德時，她的父親Richard Pembridge32歲，母親Lady Petronella Pembridge31歲。她於大約1332年與Thomas de la Barre在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年享年74歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾。

zh-hans.Rotherwas, Herefordshire (England): 英国英格兰賀福爾洛瑟瓦斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Pembridge于大约1312年出生在英国賀福爾賀福德时，她的父亲Richard Pembridge32岁，母亲Lady Petronella Pembridge31岁。她于大约1332年与Thomas de la Barre在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年享年74岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Pembridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pembridge (Herefs), which is recorded as Penebrug(g)e from the 11th to 14th centuries. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pena + Old English brycg ‘bridge’. In some cases the surname may be from Pen Bridge in Shipley (Sussex), which derives from an uncertain first element + Old English brycg.

variants.name: Pember
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Pamber, a habitational name from a place in Hampshire named Pamber, from Old English penn ‘fold, enclosure’ + beorg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Pembridge was born about 1312, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, her father, Richard Pembridge, was 32 and her mother, Lady Petronella Pembridge, was 31. She married Thomas de la Barre about 1332, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1385, at the age of 74, and was buried in Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Pembridge est née environ 1312, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Pembridge, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Petronella Pembridge, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de la Barre environ 1332, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1385, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Pembridge um 1312 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Pembridge 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Petronella Pembridge 31. Sie hat um 1332 in Herefordshire, England Thomas de la Barre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1385 im Alter von 74 Jahren und wurde in Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Pembridge è nata il circa 1312 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Richard Pembridge, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Lady Petronella Pembridge, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de la Barre circa 1332, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1385, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Pembridgeが約1312年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Pembridgeは32歳，母Lady Petronella Pembridgeは31歳であった。約1332年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでThomas de la Barreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年に74歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Pembridge(이)가 대략 1312년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Pembridge(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Petronella Pembridge(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1332년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Thomas de la Barre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Rotherwas, Herefordshire (England): Rotherwas, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Pembridge nasceu aproximadamente 1312, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Pembridge, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Petronella Pembridge, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de la Barre aproximadamente 1332, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1385, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Pembridge родилась около 1312 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Pembridge было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Petronella Pembridge, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de la Barre около 1332 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1385 г. в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Pembridge nació aproximadamente 1312, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Pembridge, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Petronella Pembridge, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas de la Barre aproximadamente 1332, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1385, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
